title: Malnutrition & Immune Recovery Synergy
description: Astragalus membranaceus polysaccharides combined with Panax Ginseng's ginsenosides elicit strong synergistic immunomodulatory effects. This pairing stimulates T-lymphocyte proliferation, macrophage phagocytosis, and immunoglobulin synthesis, significantly accelerating recovery from organic exhaustion and secondary immune fatigue following severe tropical infections or severe acute malnutrition (SAM).
clinicalAdvice: Highly recommended adaptogenic pairing. Indicated for post-infective recovery, chronic organic fatigue, or secondary immune exhaustion. Prepare as a combined low-temperature aqueous decoction.
